raw_text: there is no way to reach out customer service. if there are any issues. the chat support us very bad and buggy. I paid 1200 bucks and items did not got delivered and I am struggling to get the items.

till now I have lost around 2000 in this app. Once I paid it showed no response and I had to repay .. and I got no refunds then today only I paid for some stuffs and then they didn't deliver even after 1 hour and I had to cancel the order and they said refund is initiated ... belied me whenever the refund is initiated .. I never get the money

I thought this app was made to make quick order delivery but now a days it's taking too much long time around 30mins to deliver a order and this is now their usual routine all the order are taking too much time that when the order arrives the need of the product is no more or useless

not giving the option to list your problem when needed help with the order.... we have to choose from the listed problems they show to continue further.... my problem was not listed there.... they are not giving option to chat so that u can tell your problem without any listed problem choosing ritual....

I had a very disappointing experience with this purchase. The product displayed was BTS Oreo, but what I received was the regular Oreo instead. This feels misleading and unfair. I raised a complaint regarding this issue, but the response I received was inadequate and unhelpful. It seems like a deceptive tactic to sell products. I am disappointed with this experience.

Blinkit is a fast and convenient online grocery delivery service in India. It is known for delivering daily essentials, snacks, fruits, vegetables, and household items in just a few minutes. The app is easy to use and well organized, making it simple to find products quickly. Blinkit saves time, especially for busy people who need urgent items. Delivery is usually quick and reliable in many cities. However, sometimes prices can be slightly higher than local stores. Overall, blinkit isveryhelpful

So much sick! all the orders come in 2 - 3 minutes instead of 6-9 minutes when I order something I have to rush out and take out my money because it comes so fast that we can't think in how much minutes it has come .

third class service and app. they don't have enough money to coustomer care representative that's why they don't have. i purchased buds from blink it.they send it but it's not working properly and I wanted to tell them about issue but in app they are saying send video of problem. how can we show them connectivity and mic problem in video. please I am requesting to you all don't purchase any item from blinkit. use other like zepto etc

Multiple times I got issues with the ordered items. Sometimes incorrect quality.... 2L instead of 6L liquid detergent order. Sometimes the wrong product is sent. I ordered a trimmer 13in1 and they sent out the 11in1. I believe that it was intentionally done. No quality check whatsoever. Worst online experience.

Blinkit adding extra charges every time — sometimes it’s a high demand charge, other times a rain surge charge. Convenience is fine, but these fees are making even small orders expensive. Better to stop using Blinkit and move to BigBasket for more reasonable pricing.

Worst app, I ordered a Vadilal chocolate cake on 10 may 2026. During time of placing order it was available, I even paid the full amount with delivery charges via upi before delivery. But soon as I paid,the order got cancelled due to overdimand of that item. Now, today it's 23 may 2026, but I still haven't received my refund. Even chat support is not helpful. It is showing that refund process is initiated and will be completed till 15 may 2026, but now it's 26th of May. 😓

Pretty nifty app. the stores are strategically placed to avoid traffic and deliver in time. Never had an issue with the items, service, or the delivery partners. My go to app for most stuff. Keep up the great work 👍

Many times when I ordered meat or fish it was delivered or as rotten. Every time I reach out to customer support but they never give me a solution till now. Now frustrated with the customer support and start using other applications for fresh products.

very useful as a student who is staying at a different state. really makes things much easier to get, and I don't have to Bang my head to get my groceries and stuff, cuz it's getting you your stuff right at your doorstep without any hassle, which makes it easier to focus on my studies. Thank you blinkit!

While their is a wide variety of products, many of there delivery staff delays the orders excessively. Recently I faced a situation where the expected time was 10 minutes and yet it had taken them 30 minutes to deliver the order.

Customer service is extremely poor, and after-sales service is even worse. I ordered 4 kg of vermicompost, each packet containing 1 kg. I only received 2 packets. I emailed Blinkit, but they refused to listen to me and kept saying that all the items had been delivered. I asked for information about the investigation, but received no positive response. And the customer service department doesn't seem to understand the problem at all. So I don't know what they did with their investigation.

Good Delivery! Very quick and simple. We get all items we can think of— books, toys, clothes, etc. in the span of minutes! Very easy to use and quick to respond. Any problem, their team is there to help!

actually the experience is so good that I don't know how to explain why it is so convenient to order anything that you wanted and it just come at your door steps it is so good but the only problem I have faced a lot and I think it's not that big problem but the prices which are reliable on the offline stores here the prices are a bit high but the quality wise they are good and the packaging is also what it is so what is so convenient it get my address faster

earlier was cheap.. but now this guys have started charging premium..+ had 2-3 time bad experience even after online payments orders does not get deliver while the app shows delivered, then we have to take follow ups... so switched to zepto instead...also lot of options now.. so switching

I received my cassata ice cream in a completely melted condition. The order was delivered within 5 minutes, so it doesn't seem like it melted during delivery. It looks like it was already melted before being packed, and it was even leaking when I received it.
